headline: National Fuel Gas Reshapes Regulated Growth With $2.6b Ohio Utility Deal
summary: National Fuel Gas (NYSE:NFG) has agreed to acquire CenterPoint Energy's Ohio gas utility for $2.6b. The pending deal will roughly double NFG's regulated utility rate base and broaden its customer footprint. Prominent investors, including Mario Gabelli, have highlighted the transaction as a key development for the company. National Fuel Gas, trading around $93.74, enters this deal with a record of stock gains, including a 28.8% return over the past year and 124.3% over five years. The...
